name: Standard Processes
summary: New Meridian process guidance for states using New Meridian operational test forms and item bank content. The scoring section defines a machine-scoring test suite as test cases used to validate scoring and scanning rules and states that New Meridian bank assets should include simulated responses for ELA/literacy and mathematics items.

access_attempts.notes: PDF retrieved from ERIC and text extracted locally. Relevant passages are in the Scoring > Machine Scoring section on page 13 of the document.
